title: YO17 8SS, Mr Charles Tindall and Mr William Tindall: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3727SU/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Charles Tindall and Mr William Tindall   Installation name: Field House Farm   Permit number: EPR/AP3727SU/A001   "
